headline: How The Extra Space Storage (EXR) Investment Story Is Shifting As Analyst Views Diverge
summary: Extra Space Storage's updated fair value estimate has shifted slightly higher to US$152.85 from US$152.40, a small move that still matters if you are watching where analysts are anchoring their targets. That tweak sits against a split research backdrop, with some firms clustering price targets in the US$150 to US$170 range while others trim expectations and keep targets lower. As you read on, you will see what is driving those differing views and how to track the evolving narrative around...
